description_long: This is a modern, geometric shelving unit with a striking, maze-like design. The structure is composed of rectangular frames and shelves arranged in a concentric square spiral, creating multiple open compartments of varying sizes. The main frame and shelves appear to be made of wood or engineered wood, finished in a light color with some surfaces in a contrasting natural wood tone. The open design allows for visibility and access from both the front and back, making it suitable as a room divider or display shelf. The unit stands on the floor and is freestanding, with no visible doors, handles, or glass panels. Its minimalist aesthetic and sturdy construction make it ideal for urban interiors, such as lofts, offices, or public spaces.
description: A modern, geometric shelving unit with a concentric square spiral design and open compartments in light and natural wood tones. The freestanding structure is visually striking and functional for display or storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full geometric spiral pattern and all open compartments.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile and depth of the shelving unit.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the open spiral design and shelf layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and depth.
